THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERDOMO, YOANDER ALONSO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.50, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT.
